title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Tanishq Global Group

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Tanishq Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tanishq Global Group! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tanishq Global Group:
Tanishq Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
